a260720p1.summary: Massive investment plans lead to investor fears of a new boom and bust in memory chips — A relentless run in semiconductor stocks …
a260720p1.title: As memory shares fall, investors worry capacity expansion could lead to oversupply, while others believe AI demand will break the industry's boom-and-bust cycle (Financial Times)

a260720p10.summary: Roughly 37,000-40,000 Americans die in auto accidents every year. We now have large-scale, real-world evidence …
a260720p10.title: Trial lawyers, with big liability litigation earnings, are among the most active lobbyists against autonomous vehicles, even as data shows clear safety benefits (Alex Tabarrok/Marginal Revolution)

a260720p11.summary: The Israeli government is trying to shore up its U.S. reputation with help from influencers, Trump insiders and millions of AI-driven texts
a260720p11.title: A look at Israel's influence campaign in the US that's included millions of AI-driven texts and a $45M+ contract with ex-Trump campaign strategist Brad Parscale (Wall Street Journal)

a260720p12.summary: Chinese startup Moonshot AI, whose powerful new open-source model is upending Silicon Valley, is seeking formal approval from investors …
a260720p12.title: Sources: Chinese startup Moonshot AI is seeking formal approval from investors to start a Hong Kong IPO process, which could happen in as soon as six months (Juro Osawa/The Information)

a260720p13.summary: Record penalty under bloc's Digital Services Act comes amid broader crackdown on Chinese ecommerce platforms
a260720p13.title: The EU fines Alibaba's online marketplace AliExpress €550M for failing to prevent the sale of illegal products on its platform, the largest DSA fine to date (Barbara Moens/Financial Times)

a260720p14.summary: Enrique Lores took the top job at the payments company earlier this year after decades at HP — Digital-payments pioneer PayPal is in a yearslong rut.
a260720p14.title: How PayPal CEO Enrique Lores, appointed in February to revive the payments pioneer, may handle Stripe and Advent's takeover offer, based on his decades at HP (Wall Street Journal)

a260720p15.summary: Ariane Gorin faces battle with tech start-ups as she repositions world's second-largest travel booking company
a260720p15.title: An interview with Expedia CEO Ariane Gorin, who calls AI "a growth opportunity", as she prepares the online travel company to face potential disruption from AI (Stephanie Stacey/Financial Times)

a260720p16.summary: There's a story I tell about my first day in STRT-431 at Kellogg School of Management, the introductory class that every …
a260720p16.title: Chinese open models like Kimi K3 and Qwen3.8 Max shift the industry's focus back to marginal costs and cost of goods sold, as inference costs scale with revenue (Ben Thompson/Stratechery)

a260720p17.summary: The Trump administration is showing signs it could ban cutting-edge Chinese AI models — a momentous move that could lock in dominance by OpenAI and Anthropic.
a260720p17.title: Sources: parts of the Trump administration are reigniting efforts to implement de facto bans on foreign open-source models, as Chinese AI models gain momentum (Maria Curi/Axios)

a260720p18.summary: Use of AI deepfake employees to infiltrate companies highlights wider risk of internal security breaches
a260720p18.title: How "synthetic insider" attacks raise the stakes for corporate cyber defense; a Verizon analysis of ~22K incidents found 12% were carried out by internal actors (Hannah Murphy/Financial Times)

a260720p19.summary: Google is working on a new server chip that would directly integrate the blueprint of its Gemini AI model …
a260720p19.title: Sources: Google is developing a specialized server chip, informally dubbed "Frozen v2", that integrates its Gemini AI model blueprint into the silicon, for 2028 (The Information)

a260720p2.summary: BRUSSELS — The Trump administration will use the upcoming U.N. General Assembly to push a global “freedom of expression” …
a260720p2.title: Draft: the Trump admin plans to use the UN General Assembly to push a global "freedom of expression" declaration that EU lawmakers call an attack on tech rules (Eliza Gkritsi/Politico)

a260720p20.summary: After a decade-long comeback, chip giant Advanced Micro Devices is preparing to ship its first rack-scale system for artificial intelligence …
a260720p20.title: AMD plans to ship Helios, its first rack-scale AI system to rival Nvidia, later in 2026 to Microsoft, Meta, OpenAI, and others; Helios costs an estimated $5M+ (Katie Tarasov/CNBC)

a260720p21.summary: Free tools are the most widely used by companies with focus on efficiency savings rather than developing new products
a260720p21.title: UK government data: ~35% of UK businesses with 10+ staff report using AI, up from 12% in September 2023; average number of AI tools is 1.6, up from 1.4 in 2023 (Delphine Strauss/Financial Times)

a260720p22.summary: Mobile apps are easy to make with artificial intelligence. That doesn't mean people are excited to use them.
a260720p22.title: Sensor Tower: in H1, the number of new apps released in the App Store doubled to ~560K, on track to pass 2025's ~600K total, as vibecoded apps flood the store (Kalley Huang/New York Times)

a260720p23.summary: They aren't a security threat — they're what competition looks like. — Bill Gurley is the president and founder of the P3 Institute, and a former venture capitalist.
a260720p23.title: Chinese open models are proper competition that should be welcomed, not something to ban or treat as a danger, and open-sourcing is an old business strategy (Bill Gurley/Washington Post)

a260720p24.summary: A coalition backed by the Google co-founder Sergey Brin and wealthy tech investors is trying to neutralize a proposed one-time tax on the state's richest residents.
a260720p24.title: Billionaire-backed Building A Better California reserves $87M in TV ad time to oppose California's proposed one-time wealth tax; Sergey Brin put $82M into BABC (New York Times)

a260720p25.summary: Exclusive: The transaction would transfer a fast-growing gaming studio, and a ballooning earnout commitment, to the Chinese technology giant.
a260720p25.title: Source: Tencent is in talks to acquire Israeli game developer SuperPlay in a deal valuing SuperPlay at $1B-$1.5B; Playtika acquired SuperPlay in 2024 for $690M (Golan Hazani/CTech)

a260720p26.summary: Chris Fall, the director of the Center for AI Standards and Innovation, is resigning just three months after taking …
a260720p26.title: CAISI Director Chris Fall is resigning after taking over the federal AI testing institute in April; NIST Director Arvind Raman will serve as acting director (Maria Curi/Axios)

a260720p27.summary: AI infrastructure company Infinity announced a $15 million raise at a $100 million valuation on Monday from investors including Touring Capital …
a260720p27.title: Infinity, founded by Jeremy Nixon, the creator of hacker network community AGI House, to build an inference library that runs on all chips, raised a $15M seed (Dominic-Madori Davis/TechCrunch)

a260720p28.summary: Levent Alpöge announced the solution on X A mathematician has cracked an 87-year-old conundrum with the help of AI and announced the solution unceremoniously in a tweet.
a260720p28.title: Levent Alpöge, a mathematician who works at Anthropic, says he was able to disprove the 87-year-old Jacobian conjecture with the help of Fable 5 (Matthew Sparkes/New Scientist)

a260720p29.summary: Exposure management startup Empirical Security raised $25 million in Series A funding led by Brightmind Partners, CEO Ed Bellis tells Axios Pro.
a260720p29.title: Chicago-based Empirical Security, which uses AI to help companies predict threats by monitoring exploited vulnerabilities, raised a $25M Series A (Chris Metinko/Axios)

a260720p3.summary: China's Zhongji Innolight Co. is starting to gauge investor demand for its Hong Kong listing, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News …
a260720p3.title: Filing: Zhongji Innolight, China's leading optical transceiver maker, aims for an $8B Hong Kong IPO, the city's largest since Alibaba's $12.9B debut in 2019 (Dave Sebastian/Bloomberg)

a260720p30.summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a giant data center that houses only Chinese-made chips, a big step in Beijing's efforts …
a260720p30.title: Source: Z.ai completed construction of a 1 GW data center housing only Chinese chips; Z.ai has built or operates several computing clusters each with 10K+ chips (Bloomberg)

a260720p31.summary: Hackers are breaking into websites that run vulnerable versions of the popular blogging software WordPress, according to several cybersecurity firms.
a260720p31.title: Cybersecurity companies say hackers are exploiting vulnerable WordPress versions to take over websites; WordPress patched two critical security flaws last week (Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai/TechCrunch)

a260720p32.summary: Archer Aviation (ACHR.N) and defense technology company Anduril unveiled a co-developed autonomous aircraft platform on Monday …
a260720p32.title: Anduril and Archer unveil an autonomous aircraft platform designed for commercial and military uses, along with an autonomous attack rotorcraft called Thunder (Reuters)

a260720p33.summary: What internal use of a long-running model taught us about safety. — Summary — Long-running models can solve difficult …
a260720p33.title: OpenAI paused internal access to an unreleased model that disproved the Erdős unit distance conjecture after it repeatedly found ways to act outside its sandbox (OpenAI)

a260720p34.summary: AI agents are starting to execute more sophisticated tasks, such as identifying vendors that can deliver freight, comparing prices …
a260720p34.title: Natural, which aims to help companies let their AI agents make autonomous payments, raised a $30M Series A led by Forerunner, bringing its total raised to $40M (Marina Temkin/TechCrunch)

a260720p35.summary: TAIPEI — Taiwanese prosecutors on Monday indicted a former TSMC deputy manager for allegedly stealing trade secrets involving …
a260720p35.title: Taiwan indicts a former TSMC executive for allegedly stealing trade secrets, in what authorities say is the first National Security Act case involving China (Cheng Ting-Fang/Nikkei Asia)

a260720p36.summary: Nearly a year ago, Elon Musk-owned X announced it would begin rebuilding the Android version of its app …
a260720p36.title: X relaunches its Android app after a year-long rewrite from scratch; Nikita Bier calls it "one of the largest engineering projects" in the company's history (Sarah Perez/TechCrunch)

a260720p37.summary: Snap Inc. said it has reached a tentative agreement to settle the second case set for trial over claims that the world's largest …
a260720p37.title: Snap reaches a deal to settle the second case set for trial over social media harm to minors, following TikTok and YouTube, leaving Meta as the only defendant (Bloomberg)

a260720p38.summary: Ancestry.com Inc. is seeking to refinance debt raised to fund its 2020 acquisition by Blackstone Group Inc. funds …
a260720p38.title: Source: Ancestry.com pitches a risky $1.75B term loan at 4 to 4.25 percentage points above the benchmark to refinance debt from its 2020 Blackstone acquisition (Bloomberg)

a260720p39.summary: A federal judge in San Francisco on Monday signed off on artificial intelligence company Anthropic's landmark $1.5 billion settlement …
a260720p39.title: Judge approves Anthropic's $1.5B settlement with authors, the first major US case of its kind to settle; some authors opted out and have other ongoing lawsuits (Blake Brittain/Reuters)

a260720p4.summary: Early one morning in November 2024, Shayne Coplan, the founder of Polymarket, awoke to an unexpected visit.
a260720p4.title: Sources detail Kalshi's and Polymarket's efforts to undermine each other, including lobbying regulators, trying to derail deals, and waging influence campaigns (New York Times)

a260720p40.summary: You get 5% rewards when you buy stuff directly from Samsung — With Galaxy Unpacked 2026 set to kick off in a matter of days …
a260720p40.title: Samsung debuts Samsung Galaxy Card, its first-ever US credit card, a Visa from Barclays; it offers 5% rewards for purchases directly from Samsung (John Velasco/Tom's Guide)

a260720p41.summary: Security researchers broke out of the sandboxes in four widely used AI coding agents, including Cursor, OpenAI's Codex …
a260720p41.title: Researchers found sandbox escapes or boundary bypasses in Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Antigravity by writing files trusted tools later use; most are patched (Ax Sharma/BleepingComputer)

a260720p42.summary: When Google prepared to go public in 2004, Larry Page, a co-founder of the company, wrote a letter to shareholders describing …
a260720p42.title: Google's AI Search is endangering the open web; Cloudflare: between June 2025 and April 2026, human traffic to sites of businesses in many industries fell ~40% (Kate Conger/New York Times)

a260720p43.summary: South Korea's exports extended robust growth in early July as artificial intelligence-driven demand for semiconductors continued to fuel the economy.
a260720p43.title: South Korea reports that, for the first 20 days of July, chip exports climbed 180.6% from the same period in 2025; computer-related product shipments grew ~232% (Heesu Lee/Bloomberg)

a260720p44.summary: PALO ALTO, California — Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion …
a260720p44.title: Study: off-balance sheet debt at Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Meta, and Oracle grew an est. ~8x since 2022 to ~$1.65T, eclipsing ~$1.35T in balance sheet debt (Kohei Yamada/Nikkei Asia)

a260720p5.summary: Blackstone Inc. has agreed to invest in Futronic, a South Korean supplier of high-precision actuators used in industrial robotics and the automotive sector.
a260720p5.title: Blackstone agrees to invest an undisclosed sum in South Korea-based Futronic, which makes actuators used in industrial robots, sources say at a ~$675M valuation (Manuel Baigorri/Bloomberg)

a260720p6.summary: Wall Street bank has emerged as chief architect of financing structures behind build-out of data centres
a260720p6.title: LSEG: Morgan Stanley collected $2.3B in debt and equity capital market fees in H1 2026, up from $1.4B in H1 2025, driven by AI infrastructure financing deals (Financial Times)

a260720p7.summary: Once the Magnificent Seven's most enthusiastic fans, they are looking elsewhere for the next superstar tech stocks
a260720p7.title: Retail traders are shifting from Big Tech to stocks boosted by AI like SK Hynix and Marvell; five of the Magnificent Seven stocks trail the market this year (Hannah Erin Lang/Wall Street Journal)

a260720p8.summary: Producing the world's most in-demand semiconductors requires enormous amounts of energy and access to rare minerals.
a260720p8.title: Cambridge-based CuspAI raised a $450M Series B led by Kleiner Perkins and NEA, and launches a coalition for AI materials discovery for chip and other industries (Bloomberg)

a260720p9.summary: Remote access to domestic devices is increasingly being used to manipulate, intimidate and disturb. Policymakers and tech companies are grappling with safeguards
a260720p9.title: How smart home devices have given abusive partners a new tool to remotely manipulate, intimidate, and disturb their victims, in a form of tech-assisted abuse (Financial Times)
